name: article
description: Write a complete technical article with competitive research, drafting, fact-check, review, and delivery. Full 14-step pipeline.
input_template: Write a comprehensive technical article about {{topic}}. Target audience: {{audience|intermediate}}. Target keyword: {{keyword}}. Competitor URLs to analyze: {{competitors|none}}. Additional instructions: {{instructions|none}}

name: optimize
description: Optimize an existing article with competitive analysis and quality improvements. 12-step pipeline.
input_template: Optimize the existing article at path {{path}}. Target keyword: {{keyword}}. New competitors to analyze: {{competitors|none}}. Focus areas: {{focus|all}}.

name: rewrite
description: Rebuild a rough draft or AI-generated content from scratch following quality standards. 11-step pipeline.
input_template: Rewrite the content at path {{path}}. Source quality: {{source_quality|rough}}. Target improvements: {{target_improvements|all}}.

name: audit
description: Audit an article against the 100-point quality scoring framework. Read-only, no file changes.
input_template: Audit the article at path {{path}} against the quality standards framework. Deliver a scored report with issues, strengths, critical fixes, and verdict.

name: brief
description: Create a content brief with competitive research and killer blueprint. 3-step pipeline.
input_template: Create a content brief for topic {{topic}}. Target keyword: {{keyword}}. Target audience: {{audience|intermediate}}. Competitors to analyze: {{competitors|top_5}}.

name: check
description: Quick validation of article structure and required elements. 16-point checklist.
input_template: Run a quick validation check on the article at path {{path}}. Check all 16 elements: frontmatter, H1, heading hierarchy, Key Takeaways, FAQ, sourced stats, code blocks, paragraph length, internal links, external links, E-E-A-T signals, meta description, author validation, word count, JSON-LD schema, images. Deliver a pass/fail table.

name: cluster
description: Plan a content cluster with pillar page and supporting articles. 4-step pipeline.
input_template: Plan a content cluster for topic {{topic}}. Pillar page keyword: {{pillar_keyword}}. Number of supporting articles: {{count|5}}. Target audience: {{audience|intermediate}}.

name: research
description: Analyze competitors and build a killer article blueprint. Research-only, 6-step pipeline.
input_template: Research topic {{topic}} for a new article. Target keyword: {{keyword}}. Analyze top 5-8 competitors. Score them on the 6-dimension framework. Identify gaps. Produce a killer blueprint with must-haves, differentiation opportunities, target structure, and sourcing plan. Save the research report.

name: images
description: Fetch and embed images into an article. Replaces image placeholders with real images.
input_template: Fetch images for the article at path {{path}}. For each `<!-- image: ... -->` placeholder, generate or fetch the appropriate image. For photos use search. For diagrams generate them inline. Replace placeholders with markdown image tags. Save the updated article.

name: chat
description: Chat with the Business Assistant AI for business operations help.

name: analyze
description: Analyze business data and generate insights from store collections.
